title: Living Room Decor Ideas: Transform Your Space with These Stunning Design Tips & Ideas
description: Discover 25+ living room decor ideas to refresh your space. From budget-friendly updates to luxe touches, create a stylish home you love.

- Living room decor starts with understanding your space, lifestyle, and personal style preferences
- Budget-friendly transformations are possible with strategic furniture placement and affordable accent pieces
- Lighting creates ambiance—layer ambient, task, and accent lighting for the perfect atmosphere
